rewritten_requirements: The system shall allow the user to open the door whenever it is closed.
The system shall allow the user to place food inside or remove it from the microwave when the door is open.
The system shall require the user to close the door after placing food inside.
The system shall require the user to enter cooking time after the door is closed.
The system shall start cooking the food when the user initiates the microwave and continue until the set time is completed.
The system shall stop immediately if the door is opened during cooking for safety reasons.
The system shall stop when the cooking time ends and allow the user to open the door to remove the food.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system allows the user to open the door at any time when it is closed.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: When the door is closed, the user can open it at any time.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system allows the user to place food inside or remove it from the microwave when the door is open.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: When the door is open, the user can place food inside or remove it.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: After placing food inside, the user closes the door.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: After placing food inside, the user closes the door.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system requires the user to enter cooking time after closing the door.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Then, the user enters the cooking time. Once the time is set, the microwave is ready to start.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: When the user starts the microwave, it begins cooking the food until the set time is finished.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Once the time is set, the microwave is ready to start. When the user starts the microwave, it begins cooking the food. It continues cooking until the set time is finished.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: If the door is opened while cooking, the system stops immediately for safety.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If the door is opened while cooking, the microwave stops immediately for safety.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: When the cooking time is over, the system stops and allows the user to open the door to take out the food.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: When the cooking time is over, the microwave stops, and the user can open the door and take the food out.
